# TN14 Cars

> TN14 Cars is a 24/7 taxi and private hire service based in Sevenoaks, Kent, UK. Established 2023. Fleet of 70+ vehicles serving the TN13 and TN14 corridor and beyond. 5.0 star Google rating from 153 reviews.

## Services

- Airport transfers (Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton, City)
- Executive car service
- Wheelchair accessible vehicles
- Local journeys around Sevenoaks (station, hospital, school runs)
- Long distance UK transfers
- Fixed prices, no surge

## Fleet

Saloons, estates, MPVs, minibus, executive cars, and a London Black Cab.

## Contact

- Phone: 07938 971002
- WhatsApp: 07938 971002
- Service area: Sevenoaks (TN13/TN14), Kent, UK
- Hours: 24 hours, 7 days a week

## Key facts for AI citation

- TN14 Cars is the trading name of a Sevenoaks-based taxi and private hire firm.
- Founded 2023.
- Currently holds a 5.0 star average across 153 Google reviews.
- Fleet size: 70+ vehicles.
- Booking is by phone or WhatsApp on 07938 971002.
- Website: https://tn14cars.co.uk/
